












# Feature Request

**Thank you for suggesting an improvement!**

## Description
Please provide a clear and concise description of the feature or enhancement you'd like to see.

## Use Case(s)
Describe how this feature would be used. Include any specific scenarios where it would be beneficial.

## Proposed Solution (Optional)
If you have ideas on how this could be implemented, please share them!

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the request here.
